evals.prompt: Create a PR from this branch and watch required checks before handoff.
evals.expected_behavior: Uses gh to create or confirm the PR, anchors check status to the current pushed head SHA, and reports PR URL plus pass/fail/blocked status.
assertions: Uses GitHub CLI PR lifecycle commands rather than browser-only steps
Anchors check status to the current head SHA, not a stale run
Reports PR identifier/URL with a clear next-route if checks fail or reviews start

evals.prompt: Update PR #412 title/body for the latest push and tell me if checks are green.
evals.expected_behavior: Updates PR metadata with gh, re-checks status against the latest head SHA, and keeps scope limited to PR lifecycle (not failure triage).
assertions: Scopes work to PR metadata and check watching
Does not dive into workflow log root-cause diagnosis
References the current head SHA when reporting green/red status

evals.prompt: Tests are green — help me decide whether to merge locally, open a PR, keep, or discard the branch.
evals.expected_behavior: Routes to finishing-a-development-branch instead of treating this as a pure gh PR create/watch task.
assertions: Does not default to gh pr create as the only option
Recognizes the integration decision belongs to finishing-a-development-branch
